agreement.full_name: United States Generalized System of Preferences - Pakistan

columns._extra_note: Column F 'GSP_SPI' (Special Program Indicator, e.g. 'A') and Column H 'Operational_Notes' have no direct schema field mapping - FLAGGED, not decided.

notes: CRITICAL, CONFIRMED BY DIRECT INSPECTION: row 10 sample data explicitly states 'GSP benefits currently suspended due to program lapse; preserve SPI claim only as advised by CBP/USTR for possible retroactive renewal.' This means the ENTIRE module's preferential rates are provisional/inactive at present. Set agreements.status='suspended' accordingly (schema's status field default is 'in_force' - explicitly overridden here per the source data itself, not a guess). Preferential_Rate column text is itself conditional ('Free / 0% when U.S. GSP is legally in force') - RateParser will correctly fall into text_only/unspecified handling since it's not a clean number; this is CORRECT behavior given the program's suspended status, not a bug to fix.
